description_long: This is a large, ornate battle axe with a dark metallic finish and intricate gold detailing on the blade. The blade is asymmetrical, featuring jagged, decorative cutouts and a broad, heavy profile, suggesting a design focused on both intimidation and function. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of metal, with subtle grip features and a pointed pommel at the base. The blade is mounted securely to the handle, with the mounting area reinforced and visually integrated into the overall design. The axe has a menacing, almost ceremonial appearance, with a blend of gothic and fantasy aesthetics. No visible brand or manufacturer markings are present, and the object appears solid and robust.
description: A large, ornate battle axe with a dark metallic blade featuring gold detailing and a long, straight metal handle. The blade is jagged and decorative, giving the axe a menacing, fantasy-inspired look.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the ornate, jagged blade with gold detailing and the full decorative design.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back edge of the blade and the straight handle, with less visible detail on the blade.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the blade's asymmetrical, decorative cutouts and gold accents.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight metal handle with a round cross-section, subtle grip features, and a pointed pommel.
attribute_blade_design: Asymmetrical, broad blade with jagged edges, decorative cutouts, and gold ornamental detailing; single main cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional reinforced mounting, with the blade securely fitted and visually integrated into the handle.
